module_info.docstring:
Gateway runtime status helpers.

Provides PID-file based detection of whether the gateway daemon is running,
used by send_message's check_fn to gate availability in the CLI.

functions.name: write_pid_file
functions.docstring: Write the current process PID to the gateway PID file.

functions.name: remove_pid_file
functions.docstring: Remove the gateway PID file if it exists.

functions.name: is_gateway_running
functions.docstring: Check if the gateway daemon is currently running.
